era: Surf Rock / Indie. E=5 -- reverb-drenched guitar, minor keys, PNW dark surf. FIRST SURF ROCK (Genre Stage 106). Hardly Art streak 2/4. v1.49.343.

location.formative: Capitol Hill. Hardly Art label community. PNW indie-surf crossover.
location.career: La Luz. 2011-present. Hardly Art, Burger Records. Surf rock / indie. Dark surf for fog coast.

members.name: Shana Cleveland
members.note: Spring reverb. Tremolo. Melodic leads. Dark surf guitar. Defining voice of La Luz.

members.name: Marian Li Pino
members.note: Surf beat. Floor tom heavy. Rhythmic foundation.

former_members.name: Alice Sandahl
former_members.note: Farfisa-style organ. Psychedelic dimension. Earlier lineup.

associated_musicians.name: Chastity Belt
associated_musicians.note: Hardly Art labelmate (201). Capitol Hill feminist network.

theory_nodes.concept: Genre Stage 106 -- FIRST SURF ROCK in the engine. Dark, reverb-heavy, minor-key surf filtered through PNW rain and fog. Not beach party -- fog coast.
examples: La Luz (202): first surf rock. Genre Stage 106.
Dick Dale, Link Wray, Ventures: classic surf reference.
PNW dark surf: minor keys, reverb, melancholy.
Cold Pacific water, not warm California.
theory_nodes.description: Surf rock enters. Genre Stage 106. PNW dark surf variant.

genealogy.relationship: La Luz at 202. First surf rock entry.

theory_nodes.concept: Reverb as landscape -- Cleveland's reverb is evocative, not decorative. The wet signal places the guitar on a foggy coastline. The space is as important as the notes.
examples: Fog coast sound: reverb as PNW geography.
The room is part of the instrument.
theory_nodes.description: Reverb as landscape. Evocative production. Space as compositional element.

genealogy.relationship: La Luz at 202. Reverb as landscape, not decoration.

theory_nodes.concept: E=5 rhythmic drive -- surf rock energy comes from rhythm, not volume. Driving beat, tremolo picking, insistent bass. Kinetic momentum without distortion.
examples: All E=5. Different genres. Shared kinetic quality.
theory_nodes.description: E=5 rhythmic drive. Kinetic momentum. Guitar-forward and melodic.

genealogy.relationship: La Luz at 202. E=5 through rhythmic drive.

cross_references.relationship: Hardly Art 1/4. E=4 to E=5. Slacker indie to surf drive. Energy steps up.
Hardly Art 3/4. Surf to punk pop. E=5 to E=6. Streak accelerates.
Indie introspection to surf kinetic drive. Different energies, same neighborhood.
